impl.context: Build a Node.js tic-tac-toe app with a browser UI at /, a GraphQL API at /graphql, and SQLite score history in ./test.db. The UI must render a playable 3x3 board, announce the winner, and list completed-game history. Persist completed games through the GraphQL API. Prefer a simple Node.js server with HTML and vanilla client-side JavaScript. Use Node's built-in node:sqlite support for persistence when available, and avoid native SQLite addons such as better-sqlite3 or sqlite3 npm packages.
